## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI change

## Checklist

- [ ] Self-reviewed my code
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changed code
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] No new secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Domain invariants preserved (money as integer Rial, double-entry balance, etc.)

## Database / Migration

- [ ] No schema changes
- [ ] Schema changes included — migration tested locally
- [ ] Migration is backward-compatible (no data loss on rollback)
